nodes.title: OpenAI role through cleanroom proof
nodes.summary: Get Nic closer to an OpenAI role by building a legally distinct proof lab where he is founding CEO, then use the proof as hiring leverage.
next: Keep public proof surfaces alive and legally non-confusing.
Turn the submitted application receipt into a warm referral or recruiter review path.

nodes.title: Cleanroom legal boundary
nodes.summary: The route avoids copying OpenAI marks, UI, model behavior, private systems, affiliation claims, or clone/replacement language.
next: Refresh brand and terms sources before any public launch step.

nodes.title: Cleanroom Intelligence Works company pack
nodes.summary: Pre-incorporation venture concept with Nic named as founding CEO and an operating system for proof-bearing AI work.
next: Do not imply incorporation until a separate legal/admin pass happens.

nodes.title: Proof Ledger
nodes.summary: Hash-chained JSONL receipt ledger for agent/operator work, with append, verify, and summary commands.
next: Use this as the receipt spine for new public proof and application moves.

nodes.title: Target role: AI Deployment Engineer - Codex
nodes.summary: Primary OpenAI target selected because it maps to Codex power use, customer workflows, demos, reference implementations, technical content, product feedback, and deployment readiness.
next: Refresh the posting before any follow-up so role language stays current.

nodes.title: OpenAI Codex application packet
nodes.summary: Truthful tailored packet, resume, Ashby field map, and public proof URL used to support the submitted target application.
next: Keep this packet current for referral or recruiter review while the submitted application is under review.
Prefer a warm referral route only when it adds real signal instead of noise.

nodes.title: Public AgentProof role packet
nodes.summary: Public proof page for role fit, published on GitHub Pages.
next: Keep it linked to stronger proof artifacts as they ship.

nodes.title: Public Codex deployment memo
nodes.summary: Public memo that translates Codex deployment work into OpenAI-relevant operator proof.
next: Use as the strongest public link in referral or recruiter copy.

nodes.title: Public Cleanroom Intelligence Works repo
nodes.summary: Public non-affiliated proof-lab repo with cleanroom policy, Proof Ledger, deployment-readiness rubric, tests, and passing GitHub Actions verifier.
next: Keep the repo and verifier green if the proof packet is updated.

nodes.title: Progress web
nodes.summary: Typed graph for traversing, editing, moving, and organizing the mission as it grows across proof, legal, product, public, and hiring nodes.
next: Update this graph after every meaningful proof, blocker, or route change.

nodes.title: Nic-only ATS legal fields
nodes.summary: Nic-only Ashby legal/work-eligibility fields were resolved outside Codex before the submitted application receipt; exact answers are intentionally not stored here.
next: Do not store Nic's legal/work-eligibility answers unless he explicitly asks; use the application receipt as proof this blocker is resolved.

nodes.title: Submit target OpenAI application
nodes.summary: Target OpenAI AI Deployment Engineer - Codex application was submitted; OpenAI Hiring Team receipt arrived in Gmail on May 19, 2026.
next: Track review signals and use the submitted packet for warm referral or recruiter follow-up.

nodes.title: Warm referral route
nodes.summary: Active leverage path: use the submitted application receipt plus proof brief to seek a high-fit warm pass to Codex deployment or Technical Success without spamming stale contacts.
next: Search for a high-fit warm route only when there is a real contact path or explicit outreach push.

nodes.title: Product demo depth
nodes.summary: Deepen Proof Ledger from receipt CLI into a fuller demo surface if the hiring route needs more product proof.
next: Build a small visual inspector or hosted demo only if it improves the application/referral leverage.

nodes.title: Legal entity and trademark review
nodes.summary: Actual incorporation, trademark filing, fundraising, and public company launch require a separate legal/admin pass.
next: Do not overclaim legal status in public artifacts.

nodes.title: Public OpenAI Codex proof brief
nodes.summary: Single recruiter-readable page tying the role packet, deployment memo, cleanroom repo, and current Codex deployment lane into one sendable proof URL.
next: Use as the top proof URL in referral, recruiter, and Ashby additional-info copy.

nodes.title: OpenAI application receipt
nodes.summary: Gmail receipt from OpenAI Hiring Team confirms the target application was received on May 19, 2026.
evidence: subject: Thank you for applying to OpenAI
next: Use the proof brief for referral or recruiter follow-up while the submitted application is under review.

nodes.title: Public Proof Ledger inspector
nodes.summary: Public GitHub Pages inspector for the CIW receipt chain and progress graph, with browser-side hash verification over a public-safe ledger projection.
next: Use as the product-depth proof link when a recruiter or referral contact needs more than the brief.

nodes.title: OpenAI review-window packet
nodes.summary: No-spam recruiter/referral packet for the post-submission review window, refreshed against official OpenAI role pages, Gmail state, and the new Proof Ledger inspector.
next: Use after a recruiter reply, Cory reply, explicit Nic direction, or the 2026-05-26 no-reply gate.

nodes.title: Public AI coding deployment workshop
nodes.summary: Public workshop kit that turns one AI coding run into a scoped team enablement session, failure map, rollout gate, and proof receipt.
next: Use as the enablement proof link when a recruiter, referral contact, or interviewer asks how Nic would run Codex adoption with a team.
